summary: The batch of synthetic samples demonstrates a good coverage of all attribute values, but there are instances of near-duplicate phrasings and some overrepresented modes. The diversity of expressions could be improved by incorporating more unique perspectives and styles.
recommendations: Encourage the generation of more unique and varied expressions, especially for negative intents and informal styles.
Introduce edge cases or rare scenarios to enhance the diversity of the samples.
Vary the use of poetic and formal styles to reduce redundancy in phrasing.
